evidence_rea: we also transfer personal data to other companies in the PwC network
evidence_reg: Where personal data are transferred to a third country or to an international organisation, the data subject shall have the right to be informed of the appropriate safeguards pursuant to Article 46 relating to the transfer.
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA describes a transfer, while the REG concerns a data subject's right to be informed of safeguards for transfers to a third country or international organisation; the texts do not clearly express the same constraint, and omission of safeguards information alone is not enough.

evidence_rea: we also transfer personal data to other companies in the PwC network
evidence_reg: The Controller SHALL provide the data subject with all of the following information: (e) the recipients or categories of recipients of the personal data, if any,
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REA names recipients of personal data, which is compatible with the REG's requirement to provide recipient information; there is no quote-supported conflict between them.

evidence_rea: we also transfer personal data to other companies in the PwC network
evidence_reg: The Data Subject WILL be disclosed, in particular recipients in third countries or international organisations;
per_reg_comparisons.reasoning_short: The REG text is unclear and appears to concern disclosure to the data subject about recipients, especially in third countries or international organisations; the REA's statement about transfer to PwC network companies does not clearly conflict with that constraint.
